comment: Leaderboard query orders by the single field users.zakuzakuScore (DESC); profile lookup is a single-field equality on loginLower; the activity feed orders by daily.day; team lookups are single-field equality on teams.slugLower / teams.inviteCode — all served by Firestore automatic single-field indexes. The ONE composite index below backs GET /api/me/invites, a COLLECTION-GROUP query combining two equality filters (invitedLoginLower + status) across every teams/{id}/invites subcollection.
